hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q '\[main-ok\]'; then branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"⚠️  Commit diretto su main bloccato. Crea prima un branch: git checkout -b fix/nome-fix — poi apri una PR. (Per eccezioni legittime aggiungi [main-ok] al messaggio)"}'; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push'; then current=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); pushed=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -oP 'origin\s+\K\S+' || echo "$current"); branch=${pushed:-$current}; if [ "$branch" != 'main' ] && [ "$branch" != 'master' ] && [ -n "$branch" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"📋 Branch '$branch' pushato — apri la PR: gh pr create --title 'fix: ...' --body '...' oppure usa /review\"}}"; fi; fi; exit 0
